title: Basically Free String
body:
# Basically Free String:

## Why is this mod so great?
It fixes the "string duper" fix which makes shears break the string

## How does this work?
It adds an item to "**disarm**" the placeable string and then you can just press a lever, and then boom

## Why should i want this mod?
Normally forge fixes string dupers, so this mod just _basically_ "fixes it"
